---
name: Validation task
about: Propose or track a repeatable test, trace, or reference-comparison lane
title: "Validation: "
labels: validation
---

### Risk covered
What regression, parity gap, or release claim should this validation prove?

### Proposed lane
Describe the command, deterministic route, trace, screenshot, audio capture, or
reference artifact needed.

### Pass criteria
What concrete signal should make the lane pass or fail?

### Notes
Mention any local-only artifacts required. Do not attach ROM-derived data,
screenshots, video, or audio captures.
